19: Oh, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>! Aren't you a sight for sore eyes in these far-flung lands? I trust you're still dancing up a storm these days?

20: Oh, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>! Aren't you a sight for sore eyes in these far-flung lands? I trust you're still dancing up a storm these days?

24: It hasn't been easily filling Mistress Nashmeira's shoes, but I'm proud to say that we've sold out every show thus far! It would appear that our Hingan hosts find Hannish music and dance most exotic.

25: Needless to say, I couldn't have done it without the support of my fellow troupemates. And you, of course─why, just recalling our time on the stage together is often all I need to muster the courage to carry on.

26: And yet, I know better than to rest on my laurels─Mistress Nashmeira taught me better than that. I must always strive to find new ways to shock and stimulate my audience, lest we too become just another passing fad.

27: And so I press onward, vowing to myself that each day I will strive to be a better dancer than I was the day before. Promise me that you will do the same, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>, that one day we might again share the same stage!

28: These are dark times, but the show at the Mujikoza goes on, and so I continue to take the stage and dance.

29: Of course, I worry for my homeland of Radz–at–Han. And yet the people of Kugane, too, require succor. If my dancing can keep spirits high amidst all the uncertainty, then I have done my duty as a dancer.

31: So it <Emphasis>was</Emphasis> true! Thank you, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. Knowing that, I would continue to do what I can for those around me, taking comfort in knowing that my home is in good hands.

32: What a curious question. Why, a dancer is what I am...and what you are, for that matter. Oh, but perhaps you wish to review the history of our art? Very well, then...

33: “Dancers” are the shining stars of Troupe Falsiam─that's us! We are the proud inheritors of the Kriegstanz, an ancient form of dance they say dates even before the founding of Radz–at–Han...can you believe it?

So it <Emphasis>was</Emphasis> true! Thank you, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. Knowing that, I would continue to do what I can for those around me, taking comfort in knowing that my home is in good hands.

34: The origins of our art are shrouded in mystery, but there's one thing we know for sure: we are equally at home in battle as we are on the stage.

35: With one motion, we strike at our foes, and with the next, we lift the spirits of our friends, helping them find strength and courage even when they are staring death in the face!

36: And so it is our calling to travel the realm, bringing hope and cheer to the downtrodden and the suffering. And yet, our true mission goes even deeper than that, as we learned when Mistress Nashmeira shared with us her long-kept secret.

37: For ages, we dancers have been soldiers on the front lines in the battle against the unholy force we know as the Totentanz.

38: In times of calamity and strife, when people are at their wits' end, the Totentanz lurks in the shadows, just waiting to pounce and prey upon poor and unfortunate souls.

39: It's not my area of expertise, but Kuihlud tells me that pangs of anger and sorrow that men feel cause a reaction somehow with the aether in the air, causing the darkness in their hearts to spread to those around them.
What a curious question. Why, a dancer is what I am...and what you are, for that matter. Oh, but perhaps you wish to review the history of our art? Very well, then...

40: Before they know it, they've lost control of both body and mind, flailing about violently. I've heard horrific tales of men who trampled their best friends, or wrenched their own limbs off!

“Dancers” are the shining stars of Troupe Falsiam─that's us! We are the proud inheritors of the Kriegstanz, an ancient form of dance they say dates even before the founding of Radz–at–Han...can you believe it?

41: This is the threat that you and I faced with Mistress Nashmeira's aid. Fortunately, we were able to dispel the shadows before any of the people of Eorzea suffered such a terrible fate.
The origins of our art are shrouded in mystery, but there's one thing we know for sure: we are equally at home in battle as we are on the stage.

42: Since then, we have been flooded with requests from those wishing to join our ranks. And so Mistress Nashmeira entrusted the role of principal to yours truly, so that she could stay behind and train the next generation of dancers in Eorzea.
With one motion, we strike at our foes, and with the next, we lift the spirits of our friends, helping them find strength and courage even when they are staring death in the face!

43: While the threat of the Totentanz can never be truly eliminated─not as long as fear and resentment still fester in the hearts of men─I can safely say Troupe Falsiam is better equipped than ever to deal with the menace!

And so it is our calling to travel the realm, bringing hope and cheer to the downtrodden and the suffering. And yet, our true mission goes even deeper than that, as we learned when Mistress Nashmeira shared with us her long-kept secret.
